subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond all limitation, befitteth and beseemeth that Lord of all purposes, Who in every age, era and century [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از تحدید حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و سزاست که هر عهد و عصر و قرنی را
subcodes.subjects: @Muhammad; Islam, @business; financial; property matters, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for protection, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
